prompt: Review the pre-audit working-with-databases.md snapshot for level-of-detail and structure for a getting-started audience.

assertions.text: Identifies that reference-depth/advanced material (e.g. conditional-filter boolean gates, optional-filter substitution semantics, schema-gate error codes, operation timing) exceeds getting-started altitude or needs moving/condensing
Makes an ordering/structure point: advanced material should sit below (not between/above) introductory and common-path content, or the page should be restructured along those lines
Flags the '(SQLite-backed)' implementation-internal mention in the intro
Proposes concrete dispositions (condense, move to reference/agent docs, reorder) rather than only describing problems
